# Fig. 1A — Attenuated Bitter Response in GR66-KO

tags: #example

figure_file: fig1a_tiprec.png
data_source: experiments/2025-01-15_tiprec.md
script: scripts/spike_sort.py

---

## Figure Legend

Firing frequency (spikes/s) recorded from lateral styloconic taste sensilla of GR66-KO larvae (n=6) and wild-type (WT, n=8) stimulated with xanthotoxin (1 mM). Each point represents the mean value for one individual; bars show mean ± SEM.

## Interpretation Notes

- Response attenuated ~90% in KO (5 vs 50 spikes/s), consistent with GR66 as the primary detection pathway
- Residual response (5 spikes/s) in KO suggests involvement of other receptors → see G-01
- Statistics: Mann-Whitney U test, p < 0.001
